lesson.menu_title: My Daily Routine -- Morning to Night
lesson.menu_desc: Talk about your day -- adverbs of frequency -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 3 -- My Daily Routine -- Morning to Night
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Érica Maria Machado Santarem | Aula 3 -- My Daily Routine

listenings.text: Hi, this is Camila. Let me tell you about my normal day. I always wake up at six o'clock in the morning. I usually take a shower, and then I have breakfast. I often drink coffee with my breakfast. I go to work at eight o'clock. I usually have lunch at noon with my friends. In the evening, I sometimes cook dinner at home, but I sometimes eat at a restaurant. I never go to bed late, because I am always tired at night. This is my simple routine. Have a nice day!

Hello, my name is Paulo. I want to tell you about my daily routine. I usually wake up early, at six thirty. I always have a big breakfast, because I am very hungry in the morning. I often go to the gym before work. I usually have lunch at one o'clock. In the afternoon, I sometimes drink tea. I never work after seven o'clock in the evening. I always have dinner with my family. I usually go to bed at eleven o'clock. I like my routine, because it is calm and simple.

extra_audio.text: First, say when you wake up. Second, talk about your breakfast. Third, talk about your lunch. Fourth, talk about your dinner. Fifth, say when you go to bed.
